title: Korean-Style Stir Fry with Strawberries
description: A sweet and savory stir fry that combines the flavors of Korea with the freshness of strawberries, perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the bulgogi beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the skillet and add the Korean chili flakes. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the strawberries to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to break down.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the strawberries and garlic.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Optional: Serve with a side of cauliflower rice or a green salad.
